name: DataPulse
description: Cross-platform information intake and confidence-normalized memory sink for assistant and agent workflows.
author: DataPulse

text.description: Raw user message that may contain one or more URLs.

triggers.description: Triggered for topical search and trend discovery requests.

triggers.pattern: (?i)\b(?:watch|monitor|track|follow|监控|跟踪)\b.*(?:topic|company|person|trend|theme|议题|主题|公司|人物)?
triggers.description: Triggered for recurring monitoring and watch mission requests.

triggers.pattern: (?i)\b(?:alert|notify|alarm|route|webhook|telegram|feishu|告警|提醒|路由|飞书)\b.*(?:watch|monitor|track|topic|trend|主题|热搜|监控)?
triggers.description: Triggered for watch alert, route, and notification setup requests.

triggers.pattern: (?i)\b(?:triage|review|verify|duplicate|ignore|escalate|审核|复核|处置|去重|忽略|升级)\b.*(?:queue|item|signal|story|条目|队列|信号)?
triggers.description: Triggered for triage queue review, verification, duplicate marking, and analyst workflow requests.

triggers.pattern: (?i)\b(?:story|timeline|evidence|graph|case|narrative|故事|证据|时间线|图谱|案例)\b.*(?:build|show|export|graph|workspace|board|构建|查看|导出|工作台|图谱)?
triggers.description: Triggered for story workspace, evidence clustering, timeline, graph, and export requests.
Triggered for maintenance and capability introspection tasks.
Triggered for user requests about usage/help/contract output.
